# The kinetics of SARS-CoV-2 infection based on a human challenge study

## Abstract

This minimized replay fixture paraphrases the 2024 PNAS article into a compact markdown sample for offline regression tests.

## Results

The article summarizes infection timing, detectable viral load and symptom onset from a controlled challenge design. The
fixture keeps the structure needed for service-level replay while avoiding a full publisher page dump.

## Discussion

The replay sample highlights how tightly observed infection timing can inform transmission models, trial design and clinical
interpretation of early SARS-CoV-2 dynamics.
